text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wait, the people being interviewed in this
article... It's those two men from before. That
means... they came to watch our race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"They ran the Nakayama turf 2,500-meter, which
has sharp turns and includes six corners to make
things even trickier. Aptitude is everything on a
course like that."

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Where's this coming from?" Wow, they haven't
changed. I miss the days when we'd cheer side by
side, crying together, celebrating together...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's our duty to deliver moments like those to
fans. I'm going to share this with Kita later. ♪
